on_behalf_of_actor_id.$comment: When the acting principal is different from the executing entity (delegation, service account acting for a user), record the ultimate principal here.

delegation_id.$comment: If this operation was performed under a Delegation Object, reference it.

attestation.$comment: Optional verifiable identity attestation for the actor. Non-authoritative in this profile; a future profile may make attestation mandatory for specific actor_kind values (e.g., 'agent').

agent_manifest_ref.$comment: URI or content-addressable reference to the agent's manifest (declared capabilities, model reference, tool list, safety profile).

attestation_authority.$comment: Identifier of the party attesting to the manifest and identity.
